meaning: v.诈骗n.诈骗,无王牌的一手牌
examples: How do you find the new chicane here?
Fage: the last chicane. I will see how you win.
There is hardly a corner, hairpin or chicane that we do not know by heart.
In vehicle believed to have struck a concrete barrier forming part of a security chicane.
The chicane was in place when Northamptonshire County Council adopted the road 18 months ago.
